videos.headline: Texas Tech defense comes up with huge scoop and score in the 4th quarter
videos.description: Texas Tech takes a 34-27 lead in the fourth quarter as the Red Raiders force a fumble that is recovered by Zech McPhearson for a 56-yard score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas Tech defense comes up with huge scoop and score in the 4th quarter) 2020/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Colombi breaks through for Texas Tech TD
videos.description: Henry Colombi fights his way through resistance to score a one-yard Texas Tech touchdown to give them a 7-0 lead over West Virginia.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Colombi breaks through for Texas Tech TD) 2020/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Thompson bursts up the middle for 48-yard Texas Tech TD
videos.description: SaRodorick Thompson finds a hole and breaks away to score a 48-yard touchdown to give Texas Tech a 13-7 lead over West Virginia.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Thompson bursts up the middle for 48-yard Texas Tech TD) 2020/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brown waltzes in for easy West Virginia TD
videos.description: Leddie Brown easily makes his way up the middle untouched to score a three-yard West Virginia touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brown waltzes in for easy West Virginia TD) 2020/10/24 ESHEET
